channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: 1997 Fender American Vintage '57 Precision Bass 1957 Reissue AVRI Candy Apple Red CAR 1990s USA PBass +OHSC — $2,997
item.description:
$2,997 · Very Good · Good Bridge Music

Up for sale is a 1997 Fender American Vintage ’57 Precision Bass Reissue finished in beautiful Candy Apple Red, made in the USA during the highly regarded 1990s AVRI era. This bass captures the classic 1957 Precision Bass look and feel with a comfortable C-shaped neck, vintage-style appointments, and strong USA Fender build quality.

The bass comes with its original hard shell case and includes a note from the previous owner stating that Leon Wilkeson of Lynyrd Skynyrd played it. This is presented as a previous-owner claim only and is not independently authenticated.

🎸 Details

Brand: Fender
Model: American Vintage ’57 Precision Bass Reissue
Year: 1997
Made In: USA
Finish: Candy Apple Red
Series: American Vintage Reissue / AVRI
Body Style: Precision Bass
Neck Shape: C Shape
Weight: 8 lbs 9 oz

Measurements:
• Nut Width: 45 mm
• 1st Fret Thickness: 22 mm

Included:
• Original Hard Shell Case
• Previous-owner note regarding Leon Wilkeson provenance claim

✨ Condition

Very good to excellent condition. The bass presents beautifully overall with clean vintage reissue character.

There are some dents on the bottom edge of the body as shown in the photos. Otherwise, it remains a strong, well-kept USA AVRI Precision Bass with great stage, studio, and collector appeal.

📦 Shipping

USA – $97
Worldwide – $300

Shipped via UPS or DHL only, fully insured and professionally packed.

🌍 YES, WE SHIP INTERNATIONALLY!

🔥 1997 USA FENDER AMERICAN VINTAGE ’57 PRECISION BASS REISSUE IN CANDY APPLE RED WITH ORIGINAL HARD SHELL CASE — A CLEAN 1990s AVRI PBASS READY TO PLAY, COLLECT, OR DISPLAY. BUY IT NOW OR SUBMIT YOUR BEST OFFER! 🔥

item.title: Univox Badazz 1970-74 - Sunburst — $560
item.description:
$560 · Very Good · Jakes Boutique

I bought this 2years ago. It had the original pickups, tuners and electronics but I’ve since sold them because I modified the bass. the control cavity is modified and has aftermarket electronics in them. I did have the neck professionally refretted at ThirdCoast guitars in Chicago last year. I have the pdf service report to prove it. It play very good after the refret. I Will upload the demo I took before parting out the bass. (NOTE) I will NOT keep this listing up for a long time. I want inqu from serious buyer’s on, not you digital hoarder pieces of shit you think you’re gonna watch this item for years on end and not make an offer or sale. I’m asking $560 or best offer.

Shipping price is subject to change depending on buyers location. The shipping price listing is an estimate

item.title: Fender Classic Vibe P Bass 2017-2020 — $369
item.description:
$369 · Excellent · Soundhowz, LLC

Near Mint. Played very little.

item.title: Airline Pocket Bass 2025 - Black — $800
item.description:
$800 · Excellent · The Sleepy West

I bought this bass new last year, and it hasn't left my smoke-free, pet-free home studio. I put flat wound strings on it and it sounds damn good to me. The piezo pickup is worthless in my opinion, but the humbucker sounds awesome.


  • Body : Mahogany
  • Neck : Bolt-on Maple, Modern C Shape
  • Fingerboard : Rosewood, Dot Markers
  • Scale Length : 26.5" (673mm)
  • Width at the Nut : 1 1/2" (38mm)
  • Frets : 22, Medium Jumbo
  • Pickups : Humbucker Neck, Piezo Bridge
  • Controls : 1 Volume 1 Pickup Blend
  • Bridge : Compensated Wood Bridge with Piezo pickup
  • Hardware : Gotoh style Style Nickel/Chrome

item.title: Epiphone EB-0 2015 - 2020 - Cherry — $239
item.description:
$239 · Very Good · Music City Guitars

Epiphone EB-0 2015 - 2020 - Cherry

Very Good Condition

item.title: Kala Wanderer Acoustic-Electric U-BASS with bag — $279.99
item.description:
$279.99 · Brand New · Town Center Music

Kala Wanderer Acoustic-Electric U-BASS with bag

Sometimes it’s the journey that matters, and the Wanderer will get you where you want to go. Completely utilitarian - and extremely functional - the Wanderer maintains the booming sound of the U•BASS® with a clean look -- and bass that is perfect for any situation. It was awarded "Best Non-Guitar Fretted Instrument of 2018" by Music & Sound Retailer. The Wanderer is made of Mahogany and comes with Kala Metal Round Wound Strings and a Custom Deluxe Padded Gig Bag. The Wanderer will help you find your way.

Specs Top: Mahogany Back & Sides: Mahogany Neck: Mahogany Finish: Satin Fingerboard: Rosewood Headstock: Standard Bridge: Rosewood Nut: Graph Tech TUSQ® Saddle: Plastic Tuners: Custom Black Die Cast Strings: Kala Round Wound Electronics: UK-500B Includes: Padded Gig Bag Strap Button: Black x1 Order your Kala Wanderer Acoustic-Electric U-Bass with gig bag from Town Center Music today.

Town Center Music has been providing our Reverb customers with great service since 2015 to great success. Check our seller rating, and buy with confidence. Still have questions? Feel free to give our Atlanta-area store a call at 770.831.7936.

item.title: Tacoma Thunderchief CB10C Acoustic-Electric Bass w/ Original Case — $750
item.description:
$750 · Excellent · Remix Music

Tacoma Thunderchief CB10C Acoustic-Electric Bass w/ Original Case in excellent condition.

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe Bass VI 2021 - Present - Shell Pink — $650
item.description:
$650 · Excellent · Mockshop Music Exchange

2021 Squier by Fender Bass VI w/ Gig Bag.

Great playing guitar in excellent condition.

Weight: 9.14lbs

item.title: Yamaha TRBX174 Electric Bass 4 String Alder Body, Rosewood Fingerboard Black — $289.99
item.description:
$289.99 · Brand New · Haight Ashbury Music Center

Yamaha TRBX174 Electric Bass 4 String Alder Body, Rosewood Fingerboard Black

You’re the bedrock of your music. The foundation. The fundamental. You need an instrument with the strength and power to perform, an instrument that gives you the freedom to innovate and to create without limits. You need a bass where everything‘s just right - sound, looks, feel - nothing comes second.

With a unique combination of advanced design, precision engineering and time-honored craftsmanship, the Yamaha Guitar Development team has created the perfect instrument for bass players who aren’t willing to compromise - an instrument with the tone you need to underpin your performance and the flexibility to allow you to create and define your own voice. Offering unparalleled comfort, incredible playability and road-ready durability, night after night, session after session, this series was designed to be the core of your music.

This is TRBX. This is the bass you’ve been waiting for.

The TRBX174 represents a price breakthrough for the TRBX range, yet the quality is everything you'd expect from a Yamaha bass.

General Specifications

  • Construction: Bolt-on
  • Scale Length: 34" (863.6 mm)
  • Body Materials: Mahogany
  • Body Finish: Gloss Polyurethane
  • Neck Materials: Maple
  • Neck Finish: Satin Polyurethane
  • Fingerboard Materials: Rosewood
  • Fingerboard Radius: 10" (250 mm)
  • Fret Wire: Medium
  • Number of Frets: 24
  • Nut Materials: Urea
  • Width @ 0 Fret / 12th Fret: 40.0 / 56.4 mm
  • Thickness @ 1st Fret / 12th Fret: 21.0 / 24.4 mm
  • Neck Pickup: Split Single Coil / Ceramic
  • Bridge Pickup: Single Coil / Ceramic
  • Controls: Neck P.U. Volume, Bridge P.U. Volume, Master Tone
  • Bridge: Vintage Style
  • String Spacing: 19mm
  • Tailpiece: -
  • Tuning Machines: CoveredString Gauge: 0.045-0.105

item.title: Ibanez GSR100EX-BK Gio Soundgear 2008 - 2023 - Black — $192.50
item.description:
$192.50 · Very Good · Bearded Monkey Music

Ibanez GSR100EX-BK Gio Soundgear

does not ship with gig bag or case, guitar only

item.title: Ibanez SR300EB CA 2022 - Candy Apple Red — $297.70
item.description:
$297.70 · Excellent · LL Music Center

A very nice Ibanez SR300EB CA 4-string solid-body bass guitar from 2022, in Candy Apple Red, featuring a Nyatoh body, a 5-piece walnut/maple neck with a Jatoba fretboard, pearl dot inlays, 2 x Ibanez PowerSpan Dual Coil pickups, Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ with 3-way “Power Tap” switch, Accu-Cast B120 bridge, black hardware, in excellent condition

item.title: Squier Affinity Jazz Bass — $300
item.description:
$300 · Good · Duration's Gear Emporium

Used in good condition. Bass has brand new Rotosound 66 strings and has been professionally set up and tuned. Great starter bass. Sounds amazing!

Local pick up in Houston, Texas 77006, Montrose.

item.title: Lakland Skyline 44-64 Custom PJ 2016 - Present - Ice Blue Metallic — $1,199
item.description:
$1,199 · Excellent · Music Go Round North Olmsted

Comes with original hard case. no blemishes or marks.

item.title: Warwick Corvette Standard Fretless Bass...made in Germany — $1,700
item.description:
$1,700 · Excellent · Alan Gottesman

Warwick Corvette Standard Fretless Bass is in excellent condition, serial # K 138647 07, made in Germany. Production date Oct. 23, 2007. Has a Bubunga Body with Ovangkol Neck, natural oil finish, chrome hardware. Neck is straight & action is easy. Very clean Bass, has been cared for. Comes in that hard case shown. Of course the Instrument pictured is the actual Instrument you will receive. Free shipping in 48 States.

item.title: Ibanez used ATK305 5 String Active Bass — $550
item.description:
$550 · Excellent · Bentley Guitar Studios

Active electronics, gig bag included.

item.title: Steinberger XL25 Fretless 1988 - Black — $8,200
item.description:
$8,200 · Very Good · John's Gear Bazaar

Here is a rare find! A 5 string fretless unlined Steinberger bass! Purchased in 1988 from Guitar Resurrection in Austin. I am the sole owner of this fabulous bass. The instrument was modified by Peekamoose which is a certified Steinberger shop. A 13 pin synth access was added using Ghost piezoelectric bridge pieces. So you can use this with any V-Bass model or Roland 13 pin synth boxes out there now. It is also of course immediately usable with the quarter inch instrument jack in a traditional manner. Best sounding fretless I’ve ever played! I do have the original bridge pieces if needed for any reason. Don’t hesitate to ask any questions.

item.title: Charvel Pro-Mod Series Electric Bass Guitar 2022 - White — $600
item.description:
$600 · Excellent · Superior Music / RadioShack

For sale is a pro mod series charvel bass guitar made in Mexico in 2022.
Bass is set up.
New strings. Nice low action for playability out the box.
Ships with tracking.

item.title: Sterling Sub Series Stingray Bass - Trans Blue Satin - 2023 — $419.99
item.description:
$419.99 · Excellent · Tommy's Guitar Shop

2023 Sterling Sub Series Stingray Bass - Trans Blue Satin in clean condition and perfect playing order. A gigbag is included.

item.title: Fender Squier Classic Vibe '60s Mustang Bass, Surf Green — $499.99
item.description:
$499.99 · Brand New · Music Land

Description

While small in stature, the Classic Vibe '60s Mustang® Bass packs a punch of incredible tone courtesy of the Fender-Designed alnico split-coil pickup. Small hands will appreciate the short 30" scale length and slim, comfortable "C"-shaped neck profile with an easy-playing 9.5"-radius fingerboard and narrow-tall frets. This throwback Squier model also features 1960s-inspired headstock markings, rich-looking nickel-plated hardware and a slick vintage-tint gloss neck finish for an old-school vibe.

Features
  • 100% designed by Fender
  • Inspired by 1960s-era Mustang Bass models
  • Fender-Designed alnico pickups
  • Vintage-tint gloss neck finish
  • Nickel-plated hardware

General Series Classic Vibe
Orientation Right-Hand
Color Surf Green
Country Of Origin Indonesia

Neck Neck Material Maple
Neck Finish Tinted Gloss Urethane
Neck Shape "C" Shape
Neck Construction Bolt-On
Fingerboard Radius 9.5" (241 mm)
Fingerboard Material Indian Laurel
Position Inlays White Pearloid Dot
Number of Frets 20
Truss Rod Head Adjust
String Nut Bone
Nut Width 1.5" (38.1 mm)
Nut Material Bone
Fret Size Narrow Tall
Scale Length 30" (762 mm) Body Body Nyatoh
Body Finish Gloss Polyurethane
Body Shape Mustang® Bass
Body Material Nyatoh

Hardware Bridge 4-Saddle Mustang® Bass Strings-Through-Body
Pickguard 3-Ply Parchment
Control Knobs Black Vintage-Style
Hardware Finish Nickel
Tuning Machines Vintage-Style
Strings Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.105 Gauges)
Neck Plate 4-Bolt Squier®
Strap Buttons Standard Electronics Neck Pickup Fender® Designed Alnico Split Single-Coil
Pickup Configuration Split Single-Coil
Controls Master Volume, Master Tone
Switching None

item.title: Fender Squier Classic Vibe '70s Jazz Bass V, Black — $559.99
item.description:
$559.99 · Brand New · Music Land

Description

The Classic Vibe '70s Jazz Bass® V is a nod to the 1970s evolution of the J Bass®, combining the luxurious playability that made it famous with the versatility and massive tone of its dual Fender-Designed alnico single-coil pickups. Player-friendly features include a slim, comfortable "C"-shaped neck profile with an easy-playing 9.5"-radius fingerboard and narrow-tall frets, as well as a vintage-style bridge with slotted barrel saddles for solid string stability. This throwback Squier model also features 1970s-inspired headstock markings, rich-looking nickel-plated hardware and a slick vintage-tint gloss neck finish for an old-school vibe.

Features
  • 100% Designed by Fender
  • Inspired by 1970s-era Jazz Bass models
  • Fender-Designed alnico pickups
  • Vintage-tint gloss neck finish
  • Nickel-plated hardware
General Series Classic Vibe
Orientation Right-Hand
Color Black
Country Of Origin Indonesia

Neck Headstock Jazz Bass®
Neck Material Maple
Neck Finish Tinted Gloss Urethane
Neck Shape "C" Shape
Fingerboard Radius 9.5" (241 mm)
Fingerboard Material Maple
Position Inlays Black Block
Number of Frets 20
Truss Rod Head Adjust
String Nut Bone
Nut Width 1.875" (47.6 mm)
Nut Material Bone
Fret Size Narrow Tall
Scale Length 34" (864 mm) Body Body Poplar
Body Finish Gloss Polyurethane
Body Shape Jazz Bass®
Body Material Poplar

Hardware Bridge 5-Saddle Vintage-Style
Pickguard 3-Ply Black
Pickup Covers Black
Control Knobs Black Plastic
Hardware Finish Nickel
Tuning Machines Vintage-Style
String Trees Vintage Style Discs
Strings Fender® USA Nickel Plated Steel, (Gauges .045 - .130)
Neck Plate 4-Bolt Squier®
Strap Buttons Standard

Electronics Bridge Pickup Fender® Designed Alnico Single-Coil
Neck Pickup Fender® Designed Alnico Single-Coil
Pickup Configuration SS
Controls Volume 1. (Neck Pickup), Volume 2. (Bridge Pickup), Tone
Switching None

item.title: KYDD Bass - Boutique Electric Upright Bass - 34-inch Big KYDD — $1,243.67
item.description:
$1,243.67 · Good · Julian's Boutique

This is a handmade boutique electric upright bass, made in the USA by the prestigious KYDD Bass. This was shipped new to the UK from the USA in 2018, for a price of £1800, not including the import fees I paid to HMRC.


The model is the KYDD Bass Big KYDD

  • 34 inch scale length
  • Curly Maple neck/body
  • Granadillo fingerboard
  • Natural finish
  • Fishman BP 100 Transducer pickup

item.title: Eko Cobra Bass Guitar - Vintage 1960s - Made In Italy — $717.18
item.description:
$717.18 · Fair · Julian's Boutique

This is a vintage Eko Cobra bass guitar from circa 1967. 

I have owned it for over 15 years, but I have barely used it in the last 7 years since I started playing 5-string. It is in worn but playable condition. 

The neck is maple, fretboard is rosewood. Body is basswood or other similar low density hardwood. 

It is a short scale (30” scale length) and is very light. It has a thumpy 60s tone, good for playing Beatles etc. 

It has lots of wear and tear, as seen in the pictures, including a repair on the back of the upper horn. The frets are in worn condition but have a bit of life left in them. 

It is all original except the winding of the pick-up. I had it rewound by an expert as the original winding was low output.

The neck has some relief in it and hence the action is medium-to-high. It could be reduced by adjusting the bridge (or shimming the neck). I don’t think that the truss rod works properly as I did try to tighten it and it didn’t seem to make any difference. 

On the whole, it’s an interesting and very rare instrument, great for collectors. I wouldn’t recommend it as a workhorse instrument for playing gigs night after night as it is old and worn and fragile, but it’s good for home and studio use. 

The strings are quite old and due for replacement.

item.title: Lavender Purple Over Paisley Relic 5-String J-Style Bass by Dhatarattha — $697.48
item.description:
$697.48 · Brand New · Dhatarattha Guitars

The DEB5 is a 5-string bass built for players who want modern playability, solid low-end response, and a unique visual style.

Finished in a Lavender Purple Over Paisley Relic nitro lacquer finish, it features a mahogany body, roasted maple neck, rosewood fretboard, stainless steel frets, and a 3-band EQ system paired with hand-wound Laohao pickups.

The dual single-coil pickup configuration delivers tight lows, clear articulation, and enough top-end presence for slap, funk, rock, and modern jazz applications.


The Tech Features

Body

Body Material: Mahogany

Body Finish: Paisley Relic

Body Paint: Nitro

Body Construction: Solid

Neck

Neck Material: Roasted Maple

Neck Construction: One-Piece

Neck Joint: Bolt-On

Neck Finish: Satin

Neck Shape: C-shape

Scale Length: 864mm / 34"

Fretboard Material: Rosewood

Fretboard Radius: 350mm

Number of Frets: 20 Frets

Fret Material: Stainless Steel

Fret Size: Medium Jumbo

Nut Material: Bone

Nut Width: 45mm

Position Inlays: Block Inlays

Binding: N/A

Side Dots: Glow in the Dark

Truss Rod: Dual Action 2-Way

Electronics

Bridge Pickup: Laohao Hand Made Single-Coil Pickup

Middle Pickup: N/A

Neck Pickup: Laohao Hand Made Single-Coil Pickup

Switching: N/A

Configuration: SS

Special Electronics: 3-Band EQ

Hardware

Bridge: Hardtail

Hardware Finish: Chrome

Machine Heads: Chrome Open-Geared Clover-Style

Pickguard: Transparent

Miscellaneous/Special Features

Strings: 45-130


Accessories

Included Accessories:  Truss Rod Adjustment Key, Bridge Adjustment Key, Strap Locks

item.title: ESP LTD F-255 FM 5 String Neck-through 35" Scale 2006-07 - Transparent Black Flame Maple Top — $685
item.description:
$685 · Excellent · Cody's Bass Cave

Stand apart from the crowd!
As unconventional as this new ESP bass looks, it's built with high quality woods and EMG HZ pickups with 3-band active EQ, just like some of the best basses in the world. The Transparent Black Flame Maple Top and Radical body angles and deep cutaway provide the look and playability of a truly extreme instrument. Features include an upgraded 5-piece maple/walnut neck, an Agathis body, 24-fret rosewood fingerboard, double-action truss rod, and a deluxe Neck through body design.

5-piece Maple/Walnut Neck through design
This neck design provides a very solid feel and an improved transfer of tone and sustain from the neck to the body. Increased neck stability and performance will man less frequent truss rod adjustments

35 in. Long Scale Bass
The increased scale length provides tighter overall tension and improved performance, resulting in better response, especially from the lower strings. 5-string aficionados and those using dropped-tunings will find this feature a must-have.

Double Action Truss Rods
All ESP/LTD guitars and basses feature a 'double-action' truss rod design. Unlike a normal (single) truss rod, this one is adjustable in two different directions. This means that you'll never run into a situation where the neck has 'run out of adjustment'. Regardless of which ESP model you choose, you'll get years and years of playing enjoyment.

EMG-HZ Pickups
Each EMG-HZ bass pickup is created for its unique sound quality and includes features from over 25 years of EMG's design experience. Players all over the world agree that EMG is the leading authority in pickup technology. EMG-HZ: advancing the art of the passive pickup.

Let's Be Real...

Its easily one of the best sounding basses I have and it's like New condition is Hard to beat. But the 35 scale is a Monster, and this thing is made for shredding, but I’m changing gears musically. The sound is incredible, and The Neck through the body makes the tone and sustain off the chain. Don't miss out on a Bass that will make you stand out from the crowd, in Sound and Looks!!!  Like New Custom Hard-Shell Case Included! You can’t even find a solid body 5 string bass for under $900 and not one like this. This is the only one of these models I have seen anywhere in person, and I ordered it Brand New(I'm the only owner). It's built to last and I don't really want to sell it to be honest. Jump on it before it’s too late.      

Increased neck stability and performance will mean less frequent truss rod adjustments 35 in. Long Scale Bass The increased scale length provides tighter overall tension and improved performance, resulting in better response, especially from the lower strings, *but those pinch harmonics are wild!* 5-string aficionados and those using dropped-tunings will find this feature a must-have. Double Action Truss Rods All ESP/LTD guitars and basses feature a 'double-action' truss rod design. Unlike a normal (single) truss rod, this one is adjustable in two different directions. This means that you'll never run into a situation where the neck has 'run out of adjustment'.   

·Includes Custom Hard-Shell Case

·Black chrome hardware

·Grover Tuners

·five knobs (vol, treb., mid, bass, balance)

·SP BB-605 bridge

·24 XJ Frets

·35” scale

*Small nick in top of headstock will provide better picture when I get home.*

item.title: Rickenbacker 4003 2012 - Present - Jetglo — $2,150
item.description:
$2,150 · Excellent · DBO Guitars & Reverie


FREE SHIPPING for the next 24 hours.

2026 Jet Glo 4003 rickenbacker. it was purchased two months ago and traded to a vintage Jazz the reminded the owner of one he had as kid!!! Bonus for you!!! You’re getting a like new Ric for a deal!

Comes with case candy and the original hardshell case!

item.title: Fender Modern Player Starcaster Bass 90’s - Black — $1,050
item.description:
$1,050 · Excellent · Don’s Gear Locker

Fender Starcaster Bass, SHORT SCALE, Black in Excellent Condition. This has to be one of the most underrated Basses that Fender Made. The import thing here must scare people off, when they really should be taking a good look. Bone stock, no cracks, breaks or mod’s. Pictures were purposely taken with led overhead lights. Black shows up everything doesn’t it. Lovely piece, about 9.5 pounds, but you would never know it. Comes with a very good quality Roadrunner Bag. This is THE bag to have for these unless you happen to get a factory hard case.As always, packed and ready to go, so no other pictures are available. Always open to reasonable serious offers. Serious being the important word here. Listing is open to the US Lower 48 Only! NO INTERNATIONAL SHIPPING! Sorry.

item.title: Lavender Purple Over Paisley Relic 5-String J-Style Bass by Dhatarattha — $699

$699 · Brand New · Dhatarattha Guitars USA

The DEB5 is a 5-string bass built for players who want modern playability, solid low-end response, and a unique visual style.

Finished in a Lavender Purple Over Paisley Relic nitro lacquer finish, it features a mahogany body, roasted maple neck, rosewood fretboard, stainless steel frets, and a 3-band EQ system paired with hand-wound Laohao pickups.

The dual single-coil pickup configuration delivers tight lows, clear articulation, and enough top-end presence for slap, funk, rock, and modern jazz applications.


The Tech Features

Body

item.title: Fender Squier Sonic Precision Bass Guitar, Midnight Blue — $269.99
item.description:
$269.99 · Brand New · Music Land

The Squier Sonic® Precision Bass® is ready to launch any musical adventure into warp speed, offering iconic Fender® style and inspiring tone for players at any stage. This P Bass® sports a slim and inviting "C"-shaped neck profile with a narrow 1.5" nut width and a thin, lightweight body for optimal playing comfort while a Squier® split single-coil pickup delivers punchy bass tone. Further details of this model include a 4-saddle hardtail bridge for precise intonation adjustment, open-gear tuning machines for smooth, accurate tuning and durable chrome-plated hardware that is sure to catch the spotlight. FEATURES
  • Thin and lightweight body
  • Squier split single-coil pickup
  • 4-saddle hardtail bridge
  • Open-gear tuning machines
  • Chrome hardware

General Series Squier Sonic®
Orientation Right-Hand
Color Midnight Blue
Country Of Origin Indonesia

Neck Headstock Precision Bass®
Neck Material Maple
Neck Finish Satin Urethane
Neck Shape "C" Shape
Neck Construction Bolt-On
Fingerboard Radius 9.5" (241 mm)
Fingerboard Material Indian Laurel
Position Inlays Pearloid Dot
Side Dots White
Number of Frets 20
Truss Rod Head Adjust
Truss Rod Nut 4 mm Hex
String Nut Synthetic Bone
Nut Width 1.5" (38.1 mm)
Nut Material Synthetic Bone
Fret Size Narrow Tall
Scale Length 34" (864 mm)
Body Body Poplar
Body Finish Gloss Polyurethane
Body Shape Precision Bass®
Body Material Poplar
Hardware Bridge 4-Saddle Standard
Pickguard 1-Ply White
Pickup Covers Black
Control Knobs Knurled Flat-Top
Hardware Finish Chrome

Neck Plate 4-Bolt Squier®
Strap Buttons Vintage-Style

item.title: 2024 Nash JB-63 Jazz Bass Olympic White - Heavy Relic w/ Lollar PU's, Rosewood Board, OHSC — $2,150
item.description:
$2,150 · Very Good · 53rd & 3rd Vintage

Nash JB-63 Jazz bass in aged Olympic White finish. Two Lollar single coil pickups. Finish is a Nitro Lacquer and the body is Ash. "C" profile neck with Rosewood Fingerboard and 3-ply mint pickguard. Stunning original gold alligator Nash hardshell case included. Heavy relic on this bass.

Bass is very comfortable to play and sounds fantastic!

Per Nash website - "JB Models - The final evolutionary stop in our line of electric basses. With their second pickup, thinner neck, and slightly more radical body shape, the JB Models have quickly become a favorite for many players. The JB Models have added midrange and treble frequencies which give them more punch and clarity than their PB counterparts."

Note: Item is also listed for sale locally here in Chicago and is subject to prior sale.

Please also note that the upcoming July 4th holiday weekend may delay shipping until July 6thy/July 7th.

Happy to answer any and all questions or provide additional photos. Thanks!

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass 1966 - Sonic Blue refin — $8,276.20
item.description:
$8,276.20 · Good · renaud's Gear Garage

Je mets en vente ma Fender Jazz Bass 1966, une belle pièce « player » d’époque 


Pourquoi je la vends ?

Je ne joue plus cette basse et il me semble dommage qu'un tel instrument reste dans une housse sans être joué. Elle mérite un musicien qui lui rendra justice.Rien à lui reprocher, le son est incroyable, équilibré sur tout le manche et pas de dead spot..Tout ce que l'on peut attendre d'une Jazz Bass est là


Un peu d'historique :

Achetée en 2016 au LowEnd Bass Shop (USA) — elle avait alors déjà fait l'objet d'un refin en Olympic White (facture transmise à l'acheteur). Je l'ai ensuite confiée à DNG, luthier parisien, pour un refin réalisé dans le respect des vernis d’époque; soit un verni nitro et une finition Sonic Blue, qui a pris de l’âge depuis...Le manche est d'origine, non retouché, non reverni.

Action basse, pas de talonnite, truss rod sans souci.

Caractéristiques :

Droitier

1966

Numéro de série : 123524

Poids : 4,0 kg 

Mécaniques Lollipop

Manche binding & repères point

Largeur sillet : 37 mm

Cordes d’Addario 040-100

R.A.S coté micros & électronique - 100% d'origines

Housse MONOCASE


Non fournis : cendriers cache-micros et case d’origine; je n'en dispose pas.


Test fortement recommandé. Remise en main propre privilégiée. Envoi possible aux frais de l'acheteur.
Vente ferme, sans échange.

item.title: MTD Kingston Artist 4 with EMG upgrades, gig bag — $599
item.description:
$599 · Very Good · CW Guitars

Greetings

Up for sale is my MTD Kingston Artist 4 string bass. This bass is one of the earlier models made in Korea and is in Excellent condition. I have it listed as Very Good because of the modifications - per Reverb.

The bass is light weight at just a hair over 8 pounds. The hardware has been upgraded to Gotoh, with a 201 bridge and GB707 tuners - all in black. The electronics are full on EMG, with an MM pickup and a 3-band EQ. Plus, because the bass is fully shielded it is dead quiet - which is also one of the characteristics of EMG pickups and EQ's.

The truss rod turns smoothly in both directions, and the frets are all dressed with plenty of life in them. The bass comes with a used FGN gig bag. The zippers and pouches all work on the bag.

The tone on this bass is clean, clear, and punchy. Plus with the low weight, it's a bass you could wear all night and not get tired. It will fit well in any musical situation - blues, country, rock, worship, you name it.

I am setting the price low and will include it in the current 4th of July sale here on Reverb. It will ship via UPS within 24 hours of payment. Check my feedback here on Reverb.

If you are looking a great sounding and playing MM style 4 string bass, get this one. You won't be disappointed.

item.title: Fender Squier Sonic Bronco Bass Guitar, Daphne Blue — $259.99
item.description:
$259.99 · Brand New · Music Land

Description The Squier Sonic® Bronco® Bass is ready to launch any musical adventure into warp speed, offering iconic Fender® style and inspiring tone for players at any stage. This Bronco Bass sports a slim and inviting "C"-shaped neck profile with a narrow 1.5" nut width and a thin, lightweight body for optimal playing comfort while a Squier® single-coil pickup delivers punchy bass tone. Further details of this model include a short 30" scale length, 4-saddle hardtail bridge for precise intonation adjustment, sealed-gear tuning machines for smooth, accurate tuning and durable chrome-plated hardware that is sure to catch the spotlight. Features
  • Short 30" scale length
  • Squier single-coil pickup
  • 4-saddle hardtail bridge
  • Sealed-gear tuning machines
  • Chrome hardware
General Series Squier Sonic®
Orientation Right-Hand
Color Daphne Blue
Country Of Origin ID Neck Neck Material Maple
Neck Finish Satin Urethane
Neck Shape "C" Shape
Neck Construction Bolt-On
Fingerboard Radius 9.5" (241 mm)
Fingerboard Material Indian Laurel
Position Inlays Pearloid Dot
Number of Frets 19
Truss Rod Head Adjust
Truss Rod Nut 4 mm Hex
String Nut Synthetic Bone
Nut Width 1.5" (38.1 mm)
Nut Material Synthetic Bone
Fret Size Narrow Tall
Scale Length 30" (762 mm) Body Body Poplar
Body Finish Gloss Polyurethane
Body Shape Bronco™ Bass
Body Material Poplar Hardware Bridge 4-Saddle Standard
Pickguard 1-Ply White
Control Knobs Knurled Flat-Top
Hardware Finish Chrome
Tuning Machines Die-Cast Sealed
Strings Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.105 Gauges)
Neck Plate 4-Bolt Squier®
Strap Buttons Vintage-Style Electronics Neck Pickup Ceramic Single-Coil
Pickup Configuration S
Controls Master Volume, Master Tone
Switching None

item.title: Jackson X Series CBXNT V 5-String Concert Bass with Laurel Fretboard 2018 - Present - Black — $379
item.description:
$379 · Good · Cape Fear Music Gear

Selling my Jackson 5 string concert bass, Model CBXNT V. In great shape besides one tiny ding on the top horn. Was just professionally set up with brand new strings. The pickguard had been replaced with a fruity one so I bought a brand new original one, so the pickguard is new. Everything works. Great sounding, great looking 5 string bass. No case. Buyer pays shipping.

Make sure you look over the pics. If you have questions or want more pics I would be happy to provide those. It cost way too much to ship it twice so questions. Be comfortable with your buy. I'll send video or whatever you need.

Jackson X Series Concert™ Bass CBXNT V

Reinforcement and Scarf Joint

Neck Finish

Gloss / Painted

Neck Finish

Gloss / Painted

Neck Material

Maple

Neck Pickup

Jackson® P-Style Pickup

Number of Frets

24

Nut Material

Black Plastic

Nut Width

1.75" (44.45 mm)

Orientation

Right-Hand

Pickguard

1-Ply White

Pickup Configuration

HH

Pickup Switching

Blend Control

Position Inlays

Pearloid Sharkfin

Refinement Neck Material

Maple

Scale Length

35" (889 mm)

Series

X

Special Electronics

Active Electronics

String Nut

Black Plastic

Strings

Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.130 Gauges)

Truss Rods

Dual-Action

Tuning Machines

Jackson® Sealed Die-Cast

item.title: Sire Marcus Miller V7 Swamp Ash Fretless 5-string Bass 2024 Satin — $650
item.description:
$650 · Excellent · Topanga Gear Locker

MINT CONDITION.

Like new.

Swamp ash body with natural satin finish.

Fretless maple neck and fingerboard.

Active/passive Heritage 3 preamp with stacked volume/tone, pickup balance, treble, stacked mid with frequency selection, bass, and passive/active switch.

Twin Super-J pickups

C-shaped neck profile

Why I’m selling it: I’m a guitarist who loves fretless bass. I bought this just a couple months ago off Reverb from another seller. But I realize the 5-string is just too much for me as a guitarist. What I will say is that this is an excellent instrument. For the price, I can’t believe the quality, feel of the neck (ease of playability/action) and tone. I did research on this bass before buying it and this sentiment is across the board; superb instrument for the price. If you’re a bass player looking for a fretless 5 string, but don’t want to break the bank, this is definitely one to consider adding to your collection.


Here is link to Sire’s website with further details of this bass -

item.title: Warwick Rockbass Corvette $$ 5-String Bass, Burgundy Red Transparent Satin — $1,355
item.description:
$1,355 · Brand New · PRO DG AMERICA

Crafted in state-of-the-art factories and implementing Warwick's classic designs, DNA and components, the Warwick RockBass Corvette $$ 5-String Electric Bass, also famously known as "Double Buck", is a high-quality instrument at an entry-level price in comparison to the Warwick's Masterbuilt German models. Built to Warwick's strict specifications, every Rockbass is meticulously crafted and inspected before shipping to deliver the true Warwick experience. The Warwick RockBass Corvette $$ 5 features the Warwick 2-Piece Bridge, with a break angle that provides optimum tone and intonation with each string being adjustable in seconds. The Warwick RockBass Corvette $$ 5 is beautifully made and delivers plenty of that characteristic low growl for which Warwick basses are famous. The Just-A-Nut III is an innovation introduced by Warwick in 2007 to give players an easy way to set up their bass to their own playing style. As with all Warwick basses, the RockBass Corvette is crafted from premium tonewoods throughout: an ash body and a maple neck with ekanga veneer and an upgraded Wenge fingerboard. Body - Ash Body - Flat Bodyshape Neck - Maple neck with Ekanga veneer stripes - Wenge Fingerboard - Bolt-On Construction Electronics - Active RockBass 2-Band Electronics - Volume / Balance / Treble / Bass Controls Hardware - Warwick Machine Heads - Just-A-Nut III Nut - 2-Piece Warwick Bridge - Warwick security locks - Chrome Hardware

item.title: Warwick Rockbass Corvette $$ 5-String Bass, Natural Transparent Satin — $1,249.99
item.description:
$1,249.99 · Brand New · PRO DG AMERICA

Crafted in state-of-the-art factories and implementing Warwick's classic designs, DNA and components, the Warwick RockBass Corvette $$ 5-String Electric Bass, also famously known as "Double Buck", is a high-quality instrument at an entry-level price in comparison to the Warwick's Masterbuilt German models. Built to Warwick's strict specifications, every Rockbass is meticulously crafted and inspected before shipping to deliver the true Warwick experience. The Warwick RockBass Corvette $$ 5 features the Warwick 2-Piece Bridge, with a break angle that provides optimum tone and intonation with each string being adjustable in seconds. The Warwick RockBass Corvette $$ 5 is beautifully made and delivers plenty of that characteristic low growl for which Warwick basses are famous. The Just-A-Nut III is an innovation introduced by Warwick in 2007 to give players an easy way to set up their bass to their own playing style. As with all Warwick basses, the RockBass Corvette is crafted from premium tonewoods throughout: an ash body and a maple neck with ekanga veneer and an upgraded Wenge fingerboard. Body - Ash Body - Flat Bodyshape Neck - Maple neck with Ekanga veneer stripes - Wenge Fingerboard - Bolt-On Construction Electronics - Active RockBass 2-Band Electronics - Volume / Balance / Treble / Bass Controls Hardware - Warwick Machine Heads - Just-A-Nut III Nut - 2-Piece Warwick Bridge - Warwick security locks - Chrome Hardware

item.title: MTD 534-24 (2023) with Super Pickups — $6,614.64
item.description:
$6,614.64 · Excellent · KK’s Gear

MTD 534-24 Ruddy Alcantara Signature


This is a 2023 MTD 534-24 (5 strings, 34" scale, 24 frets). It has the MTD Super pickups, which are a more traditional-sounding dual coil pickup. Each pickup has a switch for series/single coil/parallel operation.


  • Weight is 8.7 lbs; extremely comfortable to play.
  • Bass has been upgraded to a Flexcore preamp. I will include the original Bartolini preamp with the sale.
  • Bass has a 2nd strap pin hole, however, this hole was never used and is filled with the factory finish; so it must have come this way from MTD (see photo).
  • Includes paperwork and MTD gig bag.

item.title: Fender Player Plus Jazz Bass with Maple Fretboard - Aged Candy Apple Red — $749.99
item.description:
$749.99 · Excellent · Sam's Stomp Boxes

Taking cues from higher-end models, the Player Plus series brings together advanced features like Noiseless pickups with stunning finishes. This Jazz Bass includes a flat, 12" radius fretboard and a Modern "C" neck for fast playing. Instead of a standard tone knob, you get a 3-band EQ that can be set to active or passive.

In Excellent Condition. Single previous owner, never gigged or taken out of their home studio.

Listing include the Bass only.

9lbs 12oz

item.title: Yamaha BBP 34, Vintage Sunburst / Rosewood B-STOCK (Cannot Find Flaw) *IN STOCK* — $1,749
item.description:
$1,749 · B-Stock · BASS CENTRAL

About this listing

Yamaha BBP 34, Vintage Sunburst B-STOCK (Cannot Find Flaw)

  • Alder/ Maple/ Alder Body Construction
  • 6-Bolt Miter Neck Joint 5-piece Neck
  • YGD Custom V7 Pickups (AlnicoV)
  • Vintage Plus Bridge : Convertible Bridge and Saddle
  • Lightweight Open Gear Tuners
  • I.R.A Treatment
  • Black Pick Guard
  • Includes case.

S/N IMK509E

9.2 LBS

item.title: Sterling StingRay Ray5HH Red Satin — $400
item.description:
$400 · Excellent · TaBlasco

Beautiful ruby red burst StingRay RAY5HH bass in excellent condition.


Barely used and it shows. I recorded with it a little bit a few years ago, but never gigged, so it's been mostly untouched since. I tried to show the light scuffing on the fretguard (that was already there when I bought it). That's the only blemish I can find.

No case. Strung with flats. Plays beautifully.

Serial number B166144

Stats and info all here:

item.title: Fender Aerodyne Jazz 2005 - Candy Apple Red — $1,305.85
item.description:
$1,305.85 · Excellent · Classic And Cool Guitars

Fender Aerodyne Jazz Bass, crafted in Japan 2005 Finished in deep Candy Apple Red with matching headstock and rosewood fretboard.

The body is carved (curved) and bound on the top edge.
I was told this was a Japanese home market model as it has no pickguard. This bass is in particularly nice condition with barely any visible marks, the frets are great and it's just been set up with new Elixir coated strings. 


Smoked finish control knobs, in Vol/Vol/Tone configuration.


The neck is nice and straight and the truss rod turns smoothly in both directions. The neck is noticeably slim and the nut width is 38mm, It feels fast and comfortable to play. Comes with a new gig bag.

A really nice bass!

item.title: Squier Affinity Precision Bass - 2000 - Black - w/Orig gigbag — $239
item.description:
$239 · Very Good · Vintage Strings And Musical Instrument Co.

 There are some scratches, finish dings, but nothing that affects the playability or function of this great guitar. See pictures for overall condition.

item.title: Lakland Skyline 44-01 Standard Bass Guitar - Natural — $1,079.99
item.description:
$1,079.99 · Brand New · PRO DG AMERICA

Whether you're playing the local bar scene Friday nights, carrying the rhythm Sunday mornings, or blazing the tour circuit seven days a week, the Lakland Skyline 44-01 Series bass is the kind of instrument you want to have. The 44-01 cuts the line between premium quality and high-end price, giving you a fantastic looking (and sounding) bass for a great low price. So, if you want more from your bass without spending more for your bass, then the 44-01 by Lakland is perfect for you! At a Glance:
  • Distinct Lakland body design
  • Active pickups and preamp
  • Ash and maple - an ideal bass tonewood combination
Lakland's Skyline 44-01 features a distinct and recognizable body shape with a gorgeous ash body. The comfortable, offset waist design has a great balance and feel. The Skyline 44-01 even gives you the same custom-contoured curves, bridge, and pickups as the original U.S. version. No matter what style of music you play, the Lakland pickup system will give you every tone you could want. The Skyline 44-01 bass sports dual Bartolini MK-1 pickups and a Bartolini preamp. These active electronics give your instrument serious punch, plus extra expression across the whole fingerboard. Split-coil, soap-bar pickups give you everything from fat, aggressive tones to mellow and warm tones. Beneath its remarkable duo of Bartolini active pickups, the Lakland Skyline 44-01 bass features the perfect combination of tonewoods, giving you a harmonically rich and hard-hitting sound like no other. What's more, its smoothly contoured ash body makes the Skyline 44-01 one of the most comfortable basses you'll ever pick up, and its solid maple neck adds extra punch and sustain to every note you play. Features:
  • An affordable custom bass with active pickups
  • Bartolini pickups and preamp for a wide range of tones
  • Quality tonewoods include ash and maple
  • Comfortable for long gigs
  • Perfect for any style of music

item.title: Lakland Skyline 44-OS Offset Bass Guitar - Trans Black with Rosewood Fingerboard — $1,595
item.description:
$1,595 · Brand New · PRO DG AMERICA

The Lakland Skyline 44-OS Offset Bass Guitar combines Lakland quality and tone with a comfortable offset body and slim neck for a playing experience like no other. With the Skyline 44-OS Offset, Lakland has morphed their classic body shape into a sleek offset-waist design that’s always ergonomic, whether you’re playing seated or standing. A pair of Bartolini MK-1 split-coil soapbar pickups pump out boatloads of fat, growling tone, while the onboard Bartolini HR-5.4 AP preamp with 3-band EQ gives you the versatility to sculpt your signature sound to perfection. There’s even a 3-way mini switch that lets you select different midrange frequencies. From punchy fingerstyle to modern slap to aggressive picking, the Lakland Skyline 44-OS Offset Bass Guitar is your go-to groove machine. Plug your Lakland Skyline 44-OS Offset into your amp or audio interface, and get ready for amazing tone, thanks to the onboard Bartolini MK-1 split-coil soapbar pickups and HR-5.4 AP preamp. The pickups’ split-coil design bucks the hum while delivering beefy tone. They’re amazingly responsive, too. Dig in, and they growl with the big cats. Pull back, and they’re sweet and clear. Go ahead: slap and pop — they thrive on abuse! The 3-band preamp gives you boost/cut controls for Treble, Midrange, and Bass; you can even select from three midrange center frequencies with a 3-way mini switch. No matter what style of music you play, the premium electronics in your Lakland Skyline 44-OS Offset have you covered for killer tone. The Skyline 44-OS Offset electric bass gives you Lakland quality for a great low price. That’s because the Skyline 44-OS, like all Skyline Series basses, is made overseas and finished in Lakland’s stateside shop. So, regardless of where it was originally made, each Skyline 44-OS passes through the hands of Lakland’s US luthiers long before it finds its way to you. And when you add to that the fact that your Skyline 44-OS comes equipped with the same electronics and hardware as its US-made cousins, you know you’re getting an amazing deal. Lakland Basses like the Skyline 44-OS have earned the respect of discerning players and professional bassists worldwide. Blending vintage comfort with contemporary features, Lakland basses are known for their impressive playability. Since the introduction of the company’s flagship models in the mid-1990s, Lakland basses have become famous for exceptional tone, playability, and build quality. When you pick up your Lakland Skyline 44-OS, you’re joining the ranks of bass legends and up-and-comers such as Darryl Jones, Adam Clayton, Sean Hurley, Gail Ann Dorsey, Duck Dunn, Bob Glaub, Geezer Butler, Kat Bax, Chris Hillman, Dave Hungate — and many, many more. Features:
  • An affordable custom bass with active electronics
  • Quality tonewoods: ash body, maple neck, and rosewood fingerboard
  • Bartolini pickups and preamp for a wide range of great tone
  • 3-band EQ with 3-position midrange select
  • Comfortable offset body style
  • Perfect for any style of music

item.title: Spector NS Pulse II 4 Bass Guitar - Black Cherry Matte — $1,299.99
item.description:
$1,299.99 · Brand New · PRO DG AMERICA

Rocking the professional features that have made Spector basses coveted by top bassists worldwide for over four decades, the Spector NS Pulse 4 gives you a sleekly sculpted body carved from solid swamp ash for a bright, deep, punchy, and authoritative tone. Topping the body is exquisite quilt maple, adding more than a dash of visual elegance while giving your sound a touch of brightness. The fast 3-piece roasted maple is topped by a silky-smooth 24-fret Macassar ebony fingerboard. Spec'd with premium EMG P/J pickups as well as the acclaimed Spector TonePump Jr. active preamp system, the NS Pulse 4 is a high-performance instrument that delivers the tone, playability, versatility, and sophisticated visuals today's bass players demand. The NS Pulse 4 holds down the low end in style. That's largely thanks to a pair of powerful EMG pickups, fitted in tone-enhancing reverse-P/J configuration. This arrangement gives you the low-end punch from the split-coil EMG P pickup in the middle position, along with the aggressive growl from the J-style single-coil at the bridge. The reverse split-coil configuration maximizes low-end articulation, while rounding out notes played on the high strings. This makes total sense in a P/J-equipped bass, as you can dial in as much high end as you want with the bridge pickup and the active 2-band EQ. Mix up your signature blend, and you're ready to rock. The NS Pulse 4 includes Spector’s TonePump JR active preamp. This preamp employs JFET-based circuitry rather than op-amps, which yields many tube-like characteristics. When you overdrive an op-amp (something that happens at the peak of nearly every note you play), it clips and needs a moment to recover. This results in a perceptible tone loss. Like tubes, the TonePump’s JFET-based circuitry doesn’t do this. Rather, it softly distorts, producing a second harmonic that fuses seamlessly into your note. Beyond that, the signal right after the peak comes through loud and clear — no recovery time required. We’re really impressed with the clarity of this preamp — it makes a world of difference! Drawing upon decades of industry-leading design, Spector's Euro Series basses are handcrafted using the finest tonewoods and components. A production version of the renowned Spector NS bass, the NS Pulse 4 boasts high-end features such as powerful EMG pickups and premium active electronics. Decked out in stellar finishes across the entire line, the NS Pulse 4 continues the tradition of quality and innovation started by Stuart Spector in 1976. Features:
  • Sleekly sculpted, comfortable swamp ash body lays a rock-solid tonal foundation
  • Stunning quilt maple top adds visual elegance and sonic brightness
  • Roasted maple neck capped with Macassar ebony feels supremely comfortable in the hands
  • EMG P/J active pickups provide the best of P- and J-style bass sounds in a single instrument
  • Spector TonePump Jr. active preamp
  • Spector locking bridge and graphite nut; sealed die-cast tuning machines keep everything sounding pitch-perfect

item.title: Fender 1967 Coronado Bass I, Sunburst — $3,375
item.description:
$3,375 · Very Good · Rudy's Music

A new model at the time, the Coronado series from Fender was their attempt to break into the hollowbody market, with a 6-string and 12-string guitar model and a bass version, the Coronado Bass I. There was also a two-pickup version of the bass model called the Coronado Bass II. With all that, this model never caught on but should have, it's a great short scale Fender bass with a great sound and character. It is in great shape with normal wear to the neck and body, it is set up great and all ready to go.

This example has a replaced nut and is missing the 'F' inlay on the tailpiece. Besides that it is all original with a neck dated Sep. '67 and pot codes dated the 7th week of '67. Serial #196533, comes with a non original case. Weighs 6.2lbs. Please refer to the provided photos for more detail on the condition of this instrument. As with all of our vintage listings, included is a vintage spec sheet which details any repairs & changes of note.

item.title: Charvel Pro-Mod San Dimas Bass PJ V 5-String - Metallic Black — $1,099.99
item.description:
$1,099.99 · Brand New · PRO DG AMERICA

Taking inspiration from their classic 1970s bass designs, Charvel serves up a hot-rodded, thoroughly contemporary instrument for demanding bass players with the Charvel Pro-Mod San Dimas Bass PJ V. While the PJ V has a familiar feel, a slew of modern upgrades — including a baked maple neck, a Charvel HiMass Bridge, and an active 3-band EQ — take this instrument into stunning new sonic territories. This combination of old-school aesthetics and contemporary appointments is also represented in the Pro-Mod San Dimas Bass PJ V’s pairing of a DiMarzio Area J pickup and Charvel 5 String Split Coil P bass pickup, which merges warm, vintage tones with pristine, hum-free operation. Onstage and in the studio, the Pro-Mod San Dimas Bass PJ V is an all-around excellent performer! The Charvel Pro-Mod San Dimas Bass PJ V inherits its sleek body shape from Charvel’s 1970s San Dimas basses. With its classic contours, the Pro-Mod San Dimas Bass PJ V has a familiar feel, but with a deep cutaway for accessing the upper register. A rear-control cavity rout design and the absence of a scratchplate put the alder body’s gorgeous gloss finish on full display and highlights the sleek black pickup covers and glistening chrome hardware, including the rock-solid Charvel HiMass bridge. Underneath the Pro-Mod San Dimas Bass PJ V’s handsome black pickup covers rests a DiMarzio Area J and Charvel 5-string split-coil P bass Pickup. The vintage-voiced Area J provides an exceedingly warm and smooth tone that complements this bass's extended range. In comparison, Charvel's Split Coil P Bass Pickup delivers all the low-end, punchy tones you could ever ask for! Charvel’s Speed neck profile is a favorite of bass players for its comfortable feel and silky-smooth playability. The Pro-Mod San Dimas Bass PJ V takes the Speed neck formula to the next level by pairing it with baked maple for enhanced stability and an upscale look. On top of that, a 12-inch to 16-inch compound radius opens the fingerboard to upper-scale acrobatics, making it hard to resist slipping a ripping bass solo into every song! A hand-rubbed satin urethane finish completes the package, eliminating sticky-neck syndrome. Features:
  • Hot-rodded take on a classic bass style
  • Alder body with a stunning gloss finish
  • Eye-catching chrome hardware, including Charvel HiMass bridge, open-gear tuning machines, and vintage string trees
  • Comfortable Charvel Speed profile baked maple neck; 12–16-inch compound radius
  • Versatile tone machine with active electronics, 3-band EQ, and DiMarzio Area J and Charvel split-coil P bass pickups
  • Thumb wheel truss rod adjustment
  • GraphTech TUSQ XL nut prevents string binding

item.title: Gould Princeton Electric Bass Guitar Matte Black GB50MBK — $186.54
item.description:
$186.54 · Brand New · Music Bits Company

Model: GB50MBK

The Gould Princeton bass is the ideal choice if you’re looking to kickstart your bass-playing journey or add a budget-friendly bass to your collection.

With a Canadian maple neck and laurel fingerboard, this Gould Princeton bass provides a smooth and comfortable precision bass guitar playing experience, making it perfect for beginner bassists.

The P/J pickups deliver a wide array of punchy and warm tones, allowing players to explore a range of styles and genres.

The lightweight poplar body ensures comfort during long practice sessions and makes handling the instrument easier for players of all ages, whether at home or on stage.

Specifications

Body: Poplar
Neck: Canadian Maple (Bolt-On)
Fingerboard: Laurel
Hardware: Chrome
Machineheads: Open Gear
Scale Length: 864mm
Pickups: P
Controls: 1 x Volume, 1 x Tone

item.title: Lakland Skyline 55-01 Standard Bass Guitar - 3-Tone Sunburst with Maple Fingerboard — $1,099.99
item.description:
$1,099.99 · Brand New · PRO DG AMERICA

Whether you're playing the local bar scene Friday nights, carrying the rhythm Sunday mornings, or blazing the tour circuit seven days a week, the Lakland Skyline 55-01 Standard bass has the sonic flexibility and precise feel you need. You'll have exceptional access to the entire fretboard thanks to the deep cutaway. And with Bartolini pickups and a 3-band EQ, you'll be able to hit your bass amplifier or direct box with your tone dialed in. So, if you want more from your bass without spending more for your bass, then the 55-01 Standard by Lakland is perfect for you! Lakland's Skyline 55-01 Standard features a distinct and recognizable body shape. The comfortable, offset waist design has a great balance and feel. The Skyline 55-01 Standard even gives you the same custom-contoured curves, bridge, and pickups as Lakland's high-end version. No matter what style of music you play, we are confident the Lakland pickup system will give you every tone you could want. The Skyline 55-01 Standard bass sports dual Bartolini MK-1 pickups and a Bartolini preamp. These active electronics give your instrument serious punch, plus extra expression across the whole fingerboard. Split-coil, soap-bar pickups give you everything from fat, aggressive tones to mellow and warm tones. Bassists especially like Lakland five-string basses because their longer 35" scale length holds the low B string at a higher tension. This means that your lowest notes will have more punch and impact, with more note definition too. If you've played a few five-string bass guitars you know that some of them can sound quite flubby in the lowest registers - with the Lakland Skyline 55-01 Standard your tone will stay tight and pronounced right down to the low B. Features:
  • An affordable bass with active pickups and 3-band EQ
  • Bartolini pickups and preamp for a wide range of tones
  • Tighter, punchier B-string tone thanks to the longer 35" scale length
  • Quality tonewoods include ash and maple
  • Comfortable for long gigs
  • Perfect for any style of music
